REDU CED LEVEL OF SERVICE PROVIDES SUFFICIENT CAPABILITY FOR INITIAL RESPONSE, SCENE ASSESSMENT AND IMPLEMENTATION OF MITIGATION TACTICS. REDUCED LEVEL OF SERVICE REPRESENTS INCREASED RISK/LOSS POTENTIAL DUE TO LACK OF EMERGENCY RESPONSE CAPABILITY TO PERFORM RESCUE AND SUFFICIENT MITIGATION TACTICS SIMULTANEOUSLY.
